chunks.text:
# Business Glossary - E-Commerce Domain (Simplified)

This document defines the core business concepts for the e-commerce platform test dataset.

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
CUSTOMER
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Definition**: An individual or entity registered on the platform who has made at least one purchase.

**Business Context**: Customers are the primary actors in the e-commerce system. They browse products, place orders, an... [TRUNCATED]

**Business Context**: Line items break down orders into individual product purchases. Each captures the price at the moment of ordering.

**Key Attributes**:
- Unique line identifier
- References exactly one Product
- Quantity of units ordered
- Unit price at time of order (historical, not current)
- Extended amount = quantity × unit price

**Business Rules**:
- A Sales Order must contain at least one line item
- Cannot be modified after order confirmation
- Unit price is fixed and does not chan... [TRUNCATED]

Sales Order Relationships:
- A Sales Order is placed by exactly one Customer
- A Sales Order has one or more Order Line Items
- A Sales Order has one or more Payments
- A Sales Order has one or more Shipments

Order Line Item Relationships:
- An Order Line Item is part of exactly one Sales Order
- An Order Line Item references exactly one Product

Payment Relationships:
- A Payment is for exactly one Sales Order

Shipment Relationships:
- A Shipment is for exactly one Sales Order
- A Shipment co... [TRUNCATED]

## MODIFIED FOR TEST A
Refund: A reimbursement issued to a customer when an order is cancelled.

## SECOND MODIFICATION — extra term
Return Policy: Products can be returned within 30 days of purchase for a full refund.

# Data Dictionary - E-Commerce Database (Simplified)

This document describes the physical database schema for the simplified e-commerce test dataset.

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
CUSTOMER_MASTER
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Description**: Master record for all registered platform customers.

**Primary Key**: CUST_ID (INT, auto-increment)

**Column Details**:
| Column | Type | Description | Nullable |
|--------|------|-----------... [TRUNCATED]

**Foreign Keys**:
- CUST_ID → CUSTOMER_MASTER(CUST_ID)

**Business Concept Mapping**: SalesOrder

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
ORDER_LINE_ITEM
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Description**: Individual product lines within a sales order.

**Primary Key**: LINE_ID (INT, auto-increment)

**Column Details**:
| Column | Type | Description | Nullable |
|--------|------|-------------|----------|
| LINE_ID | INT | Unique line identifier | NO... [TRUNCATED]

CUSTOMER_MASTER.CUST_ID
  └── SALES_ORDER_HDR.CUST_ID

TB_PRODUCT.PRODUCT_ID
  └── ORDER_LINE_ITEM.PRODUCT_ID

TB_CATEGORY.CATEGORY_ID
  ├── TB_PRODUCT.CATEGORY_ID
  └── TB_CATEGORY.PARENT_CATEGORY_ID (self-reference)

SALES_ORDER_HDR.ORDER_ID
  ├── ORDER_LINE_ITEM.ORDER_ID
  ├── PAYMENT.ORDER_ID
  └── SHIPMENT.ORDER_ID

BUSINESS CONCEPT TO TABLE MAPPING
═════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

Customer         → CUSTOMER_MASTER
Product          → TB_PRODUCT
SalesOrder     ... [TRUNCATED]

triplets.subject: Sales Order
triplets.object: customer, items, payment status, delivery information

triplets.subject: Order Line Item
triplets.object: single line within a Sales Order

triplets.subject: Return Policy
triplets.object: 30 days of purchase for a full refund

triplets.subject: ORDER_LINE_ITEM
triplets.object: Individual product lines within a sales order.

triplets.subject: SHIPMENT
triplets.object: Physical delivery of products to customers.

entities_post_resolution.name: Order Line Item
entities_post_resolution.definition: A single line item in a sales order that specifies the product, its quantity, and the unit price at the time of purchase.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Key Attributes**:
- Must contain at least one Order Line Item | **Definition**: A single line within a Sales Order specifying a Product, quantity, and unit price at time of purchase. | **Key Attributes**:
- References exactly one Product | **Key Attributes**:
- Quantity of units ordered | **Key Attributes**:
- Unit price at time of order (historical, not current) | **Key Attributes**:
- Extended amount = quantity × unit price | Order Line Item Relationships:
- An Order Line Item is part of exactly one Sales Order | Order Line Item Relationships:
- An Order Line Item references exactly one Product | **Description**: Individual product lines within a sales order. | **Primary Key**: LINE_ID (INT, auto-increment) | TB_PRODUCT.PRODUCT_ID
  └── ORDER_LINE_ITEM.PRODUCT_ID | SALES_ORDER_HDR.ORDER_ID
  ├── ORDER_LINE_ITEM.ORDER_ID | OrderLineItem    → ORDER_LINE_ITEM | Sales Order Relationships:
- A Sales Order has one or more Order Line Items

entities_post_resolution.name: Payment
entities_post_resolution.definition: A Payment is a monetary transaction record, uniquely identified by PAYMENT_ID, associated with exactly one Sales Order, representing the amount paid toward settling that order.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
- References exactly one Sales Order | - Payment amount | Status: PENDING, CONFIRMED, FAILED, REFUNDED | Payment Relationships:
- A Payment is for exactly one Sales Order | Payment          → PAYMENT | **Description**: Monetary transactions settling order amounts. | **Primary Key**: PAYMENT_ID (BIGINT, auto-increment) | SALES_ORDER_HDR.ORDER_ID
  ├── PAYMENT.ORDER_ID | Sales Order Relationships:
- A Sales Order has one or more Payments

entities_post_resolution.name: Shipment
entities_post_resolution.definition: An entity representing a single delivery event of goods to a customer, identified by a shipment ID, linked to one Sales Order, and potentially associated with a tracking number, with multiple shipments allowed per order.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
- References exactly one Sales Order | Shipment #S-002 with tracking number "1Z999AA1" for Order #12347 | Status: PREPARING, SHIPPED, IN_TRANSIT, DELIVERED | Shipment Relationships:
- A Shipment is for exactly one Sales Order | Shipment Relationships:
- A Shipment comes from exactly one Warehouse | Shipment Relationships:
- A Shipment goes to exactly one Customer Address | Shipment         → SHIPMENT | **Description**: Physical delivery of products to customers. | **Primary Key**: SHIPMENT_ID (BIGINT, auto-increment) | SALES_ORDER_HDR.ORDER_ID
  └── SHIPMENT.ORDER_ID | Sales Order Relationships:
- A Sales Order has one or more Shipments

entities_post_resolution.name: Purchase Order
entities_post_resolution.definition: A formal business document authorizing the purchase of goods or services from a supplier, creating an obligation to pay for them.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Business Rules**:
- Must place at least one order to remain active | **Synonyms**: order, purchase order, transaction, customer order | **Business Rules**:
- Inactive products cannot be ordered but remain for historical reference

entities_post_resolution.name: Customer Master(Cust Id)
entities_post_resolution.definition: A customer master table (dimension) whose primary key is CUST_ID, used to identify and reference customers in related transaction records such as sales orders.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
- CUST_ID → CUSTOMER_MASTER(CUST_ID) | **Foreign Keys**:
- CUST_ID → CUSTOMER_MASTER(CUST_ID) | CUSTOMER_MASTER.CUST_ID
  └── SALES_ORDER_HDR.CUST_ID | Customer         → CUSTOMER_MASTER

entities_post_resolution.name: Customer Address
entities_post_resolution.definition: The Customer Address is the address associated with a customer to which shipments are delivered.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
Shipment Relationships:
- A Shipment goes to exactly one Customer Address | **Definition**: An individual or entity registered on the platform who has made at least one purchase. | **Business Context**: Customers are the primary actors in the e-commerce system. They browse products, place orders, and receive shipments. | **Key Attributes**:
- Unique Customer ID | **Key Attributes**:
- Valid email address (required for login) | **Key Attributes**:
- One or more delivery/billing addresses | **Key Attributes**:
- Geographic region for tax calculation | **Key Attributes**:
- Active/inactive status | **Business Rules**:
- Must place at least one order to remain active | **Business Rules**:
- Can have multiple addresses but only one primary per type | **Data retained for 7 years after last purchase** | **Key Attributes**:
- References exactly one Customer | Sales Order Relationships:
- A Sales Order is placed by exactly one Customer | CUSTOMER_MASTER
─────────────────────────────────────────

entities_post_resolution.name: Delivery/Billing Addresses
entities_post_resolution.definition: A set of customer addresses used for delivery and billing, where multiple addresses per type can exist and a single primary address per type is designated.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Key Attributes**:
- One or more delivery/billing addresses | **Business Rules**:
- Can have multiple addresses but only one primary per type

entities_post_resolution.name: Return Policy
entities_post_resolution.definition: A policy detailing the conditions under which customers can return products and receive a refund.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: Return Policy: Products can be returned within 30 days of purchase for a full refund. | Refund: A reimbursement issued to a customer when an order is cancelled.

entities_post_resolution.name: Quantity × Unit Price
entities_post_resolution.definition: Extended amount for a line item, calculated as quantity multiplied by unit price, representing the total price for that item.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
- Extended amount = quantity × unit price | **Key Attributes**:
- Unit price in base currency (EUR) | **Key Attributes**:
- Unit price at time of order (historical, not current) | - Quantity of units ordered

entities_post_resolution.name: €12.50
entities_post_resolution.definition: Unit price of a USB Cable as listed in the provenance context.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: Line 2: 1 unit of USB Cable at €12.50 | Line 1: 2 units of Wireless Headphones at €79.99 each

tables_enriched.name: Customer Master
tables_enriched.description: Stores core customer records including identifiers, contact details, regional segmentation, account creation timestamp, and active status.

tables_enriched.name: Product
tables_enriched.description: Stores information about products including identifiers, names, category association, pricing, and active status for the product catalog.

tables_enriched.name: Category
tables_enriched.description: Stores hierarchical categories for products, including each category's name and its parent category to support nested category structures.

tables_enriched.name: Sales Order Header
tables_enriched.description: Stores header information for customer sales orders, including identifiers, dates, amounts, status, payment confirmation, delivery timestamp, and record creation time.

tables_enriched.name: Order Line Item
tables_enriched.description: Stores the individual line items for orders, including which product was ordered, the quantity, unit price, and the calculated line amount.

tables_enriched.name: Payment
tables_enriched.description: Stores records of payments processed for customer orders, including method, amount, status, and timestamps for confirmation and creation.

tables_enriched.name: Shipment
tables_enriched.description: Stores records of shipments, linking each shipment to an order, tracking its warehouse, ship date, tracking number, and current status.
